pi_items.source: Verified via install_jamovi.sh and setup_task.sh which extract the dataset to this path.
Verified via export_result.sh and task instructions which mandate saving the project to this path.
Verified via export_result.sh and task instructions which mandate saving text results to this path.
Verified via setup_task.sh which dynamically writes ground truth statistics to this location.
Verified via verifier.py logic checks: abs(user_w - gt_w) / gt_w < 0.02, abs(user_p - gt_p) < 0.01, abs(user_r - gt_r) < 0.05.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset is the real 'bfi' personality dataset (Revelle, 2010) sourced from the Rdatasets repository. The ground truth statistics are dynamically computed via Python in `setup_task.sh` rather than by Jamovi itself. The Wilcoxon W statistic is explicitly calculated as the sum of positive ranks (W = 557530.5), the p-value relies on `scipy.stats.wilcoxon` (approx 4.45e-7), and the rank biserial correlation is manually computed as (W_pos - W_neg) / (W_pos + W_neg) (approx -0.142). The verifier compares the agent's output against these Python-derived values using tolerances of 2% for W, 0.01 for p-value, and 0.05 for effect size.
